heading: Log in or sign up
welcomeDesc: Sign in to save your favourite properties, manage bookings, and list your home.
terms: By continuing, you agree to Travolish's

emailStep.heading: Sign up with email
emailStep.descGuest: We'll email you a verification code to create your guest account.
emailStep.descHost: We'll email you a verification code to create your host account.

codeStep.heading: Enter your code
codeStep.desc: We sent a 6-digit code to your email.

toast.googleFailed: Unable to sign in with Google.
toast.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
toast.codeSent: We sent a code to your email.
toast.invalidCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
toast.googleError: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
